theme: Dark Cyberpunk + Neo-Tokyo + Sacred Polynesian Geometry

headings.usage: H1, H2, Section titles. Represents Neo-Tokyo/Cyberpunk aesthetic.

heavy_impact.usage: Use for massive kinetic text backgrounds or 'BATTLE ROYALE' style headers.

body.usage: All standard paragraphs and descriptions for clean legibility.

terminal.usage: Encrypted booking portal, loyalty hub data points, tech-labels.

visual_enhancers.holographic_frames: Containers should use clipped corners (`clip-path: polygon(...)`), 1px solid cyan/magenta borders, and inner glowing drop shadows.
visual_enhancers.scanlines: Overlay a faint repeating linear gradient `linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 50%, rgba(0,240,255,0.03) 51%)` on backgrounds or specific panels.
visual_enhancers.glitch_effects: Use CSS animations for subtle text shifting (chromatic aberration) on hover for primary headings or CTAs.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use `backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60` with a 1px `border-cyan/20` for floating panels so the 3D background remains visible but text is readable.

hero.structure: Full viewport height. 3D WebGL scene centered (humanoid arm). Absolute positioned UI overlays.
elements: Tattoo Style Selector (Polynesian, Cyberpunk, Anime, Patutikon) styled as holographic buttons on the side.
Cards displaying tattoo images with Neo-Tokyo frames.
Custom tooltips appearing on hover explaining the Patutikon philosophy (modern cartoon/movie icons in tribal symbols).
Dark moody portrait of the artist with cyan neon underlighting.
Studio address (Podere 173, Ozieri, Piazza Francesco Ignazio Mannu 4) styled as terminal data output.
Tab 1: Aftercare Companion (Checklist with toxic green custom checkboxes).
Tab 2: Recruitment Terminal (Referral codes, ink-points balance with glowing numbers).
Encrypted-style form inputs with blinking cursors.
WhatsApp CTA button featuring a heavy magenta box-shadow glow and glitch hover state.

components.buttons: Angular shape (clip-path corners), 1px solid neon border. On hover, background fills with neon color and text turns dark.
components.cards: Dark surface (`#0d0d12`), neon cyan/magenta border, inner glow (`box-shadow: inset 0 0 20px rgba(0,240,255,0.1)`).
components.tabs: Shadcn tabs customized. Active tab gets a glowing underline and terminal font highlight.

3d_libraries.instructions: Use a basic 3D model (like a cylinder or arm if available, otherwise abstract geometry) to represent the humanoid bust/arm. Map different textures or glowing decals when the user clicks the Style Selector. Ensure lighting uses a mix of Cyan and Magenta point lights.

media.instructions: Use the cyberpunk portrait for 'The Butcher's Craft' bio. Use tattoo art images for the Patutikon Gallery. Use the studio images as background textures or in the booking section.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over neon backgrounds uses the dark background color `#050512`. Text over dark backgrounds must be bright `#e0e0e8`.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements, tabs, form inputs, and the style selector MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="style-selector-polynesian"`).
accessibility.motion: Respect `prefers-reduced-motion` for glitch effects and 3D rotations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React and Tailwind CSS.
Do not use generic layouts; apply Neo-Brutalist grid logic but with a dark Cyberpunk aesthetic (borders, sharp edges, clipping).
Use 'framer-motion' for the horizontal gallery scroll and page transitions.
For the 3D Hero, implement a `<Canvas>` from `react-three-fiber`.
Ensure the Language Toggle switches content (you can mock the translation logic with state).
DO NOT use transparent backgrounds for text-heavy overlays. Use `bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md`.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., `transition: all`). Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Prioritize using pre-existing Shadcn components where applicable, but heavily customize them to fit the Cyberpunk/Terminal theme.
